_README: Round-2 cleanup corpus for examples/cleanup_stream_lab.rs. GOLD is real history.db dictation text (verbatim, split into sentence fragments) = the light-touch target the current pipeline already produces. RAW is a de-cleaned 'what Parakeet emits' version authored per fragment: lowercase, no terminal punctuation, disfluencies/false-starts, and dictionary names corrupted into plausible mis-hearings so corrections.json + screen-vocab are actually exercised. 'vocab' = the known-vocabulary block the daemon would inject (corrections targets + simulated screen terms). 'names' = target spellings that MUST appear in good output (the dictionary test). Segmentation here is ORACLE (gold sentence boundaries) = quality ceiling for incremental cleanup; real segmentation is round 3.
